welcome.title: Vehicle Management
welcome.description: This is where you manage your entire inventory. Let's go through the available tools so you can get the most out of them.

statusCards.title: Status Cards
statusCards.description:
Quick view of how many vehicles you have in each state (available, in preparation, reserved, etc.).

Click any card to filter the list and see only vehicles in that state.

addVehicle.title: Add Vehicle
addVehicle.description: Add a new vehicle to your inventory. The form will guide you step by step to enter all data, photos, and documents.

viewToggle.title: Table / Board View
viewToggle.description:
Switch between two ways to view your inventory:

Table: Detailed list with customizable columns, ideal for searching and comparing

Kanban Board: Drag vehicles between states, ideal for managing workflows

exportExcel.title: Export to Excel
exportExcel.description: Download your complete inventory in Excel format (.xlsx). Includes all columns that are active in your table.

columnSelector.title: Column Selector
columnSelector.description:
Choose which columns to show in the table. Toggle fields like price, mileage, seller, etc.

Your preferences are saved automatically.

filters.title: Search Filters
filters.description:
Find vehicles quickly:

Search by brand, model, plate, or VIN
Filter by status, assigned seller, or type (own/consigned)

Filters combine for more precise searches.

tableView.title: Your Inventory
tableView.description:
Here you can see all your vehicles. Click any one to see its full details.

From the table you can sort by column and navigate between pages.

finish.title: All Set!
finish.description: You now know the vehicle management tools. Try switching between table and board views to find what works best for you.
